name: ai-readiness
description: Assess repo and git history for AI-coding assistant readiness — audits, code review, security, testing, architecture, and API design

commands.name: full-audit
commands.description: Comprehensive 10-section AI readiness audit of a codebase

commands.name: git-health
commands.description: Detect 71 git anti-patterns with DORA-based severity scoring

commands.name: code-review
commands.description: 7-category weighted code review and static analysis

commands.name: architecture
commands.description: 6-category architecture and design pattern review with SOLID principles

commands.name: security
commands.description: 6-category security review — OWASP patterns, auto-fail on critical findings

commands.name: testing
commands.description: Test quality assessment — testing patterns, test desiderata, pyramid analysis

commands.name: api-review
commands.description: 7-category API design and contract pattern review

agents.name: readiness-auditor
agents.description: Evidence-first auditor with decision tree for which commands to run

skills.name: ai-context-principles
skills.description: AI context windows, signal-to-noise ratio, and token budget management

skills.name: dora-metrics
skills.description: DORA metrics knowledge — deployment frequency, lead time, MTTR, change failure rate

skills.name: scoring-methodology
skills.description: Unified scoring — weighted categories, severity levels, pass/fail thresholds

skills.name: remediation-patterns
skills.description: Common fixes across all audit categories — actionable coaching patterns
